name: Festival Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Sliced green onions, including tops
1/4 cup Diced red or green pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium-low heat until crisp.
2. Increase the heat to medium. Add onions, mushrooms, pepper, and peas; stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Push vegetables aside and pour egg into the skillet. Scramble.
4. Add rice and soy sauce; stir until heated and grains are gently separated.
